entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop that is often infested with mealy bugs.

entities.name: MEALY BUG
entities.description: An insect pest, specifically Ceroplastodes cajani Mask, that infests pigeonpea plants.

entities.name: INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of being infested by pests.

entities.name: SECOND SEASON
entities.description: The growth period of a second season which increases the likelihood of infestation.
